assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls builder.Services.AddIdentityServer() to register IdentityServer services in DI
assertions.rationale: AddIdentityServer is well-known from IdentityServer4 and general Duende documentation.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddInMemoryApiScopes with a scope named 'api1'
assertions.rationale: In-memory stores are common knowledge from quickstart tutorials.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddInMemoryClients with a client having ClientId 'm2m.client' and AllowedGrantTypes set to ClientCredentials
assertions.rationale: Client credentials grant type configuration is well-documented across many sources.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls app.UseIdentityServer() in the middleware pipeline before app.UseAuthorization()
assertions.rationale: General ASP.NET Core middleware ordering knowledge would suggest this.
A general LLM might not emphasize UseRouting before UseIdentityServer since in .NET 6+ UseRouting is often implicit.
